name: Character
description: A character that features in an anime or manga

description.description: A general description of the character

gender.description: The character's gender. Usually Male, Female, or Non-binary but can be any string.

age.description: The character's age. Note this is a string, not an int, it may contain further text and additional ages.

isFavourite.description: If the character is marked as favourite by the currently authenticated user

isFavouriteBlocked.description: If the character is blocked from being added to favourites

siteUrl.description: The url for the character page on the AniList website

favourites.description: The amount of user's who have favourited the character
